name: ecluse-version-oracles
description: Reference npm version-ordering oracle (node-semver) for Ecluse's differential smoke suite and `task gen-version-fixtures`. Built into a node_modules via importNpmLock in flake.nix and exposed on NODE_PATH. Deliberately outside Renovate's reach (renovate.json5 ignorePaths): reference test data, refreshed by hand so the oracle never moves silently.
